name: soulbot_intent_classifier_aiap
description: 11-node cascading classifier with context-aware fast routing (session pattern, domain affinity, temporal match), assertion execution, node gate, k-bounded backtrack. Cold-start, CJK labels, privacy scope, domain hints, smart shortcut, recursive drill-down, auto-promotion, signal routing, tiered cache, circuit breaker, drift detection, minimal output. AISOP/AISIP dual-format scan (AISOP priority for same-name AIAPs), flow_format in output schema (minimal 5 fields), input safety escalation policy (OWASP 2026 flagged_rate monitoring), adaptive degradation threshold (dynamic from history). protocol alignment (flow_format §3.1), input complexity adaptive routing, enhanced input safety (base64/unicode injection), signal conflict detection, backtrack diagnostics.

limitations: Node Gate: assertion gates on all non-start nodes; backtrack on failure adds re-execution overhead
Classification accuracy depends on AIAP metadata quality
Taxonomy rebuild on AIAP changes (incremental ≤30%, else full)
Confidence is LLM-estimated with dynamic calibration, not probabilistic
Context quality depends on caller-provided session_context
Anaphora discard if context_confidence < 0.6
Multi-intent conservative: may miss compound intents
OOS dual-threshold: both confidence AND scope_score must be low
Hard-negative penalty 0.9 for near-domain AIAPs within 0.1 of top score
Early-exit: only triggers below half rejection_threshold AND stateless
Adaptive threshold cold-start: <30 entries → no adjustment
Parallel classification: read-only shared taxonomy
Correction-weighted affinity min 0.3
Cascading fast-path: only unambiguous keyword matches with no overlap
Dynamic calibration factor [0.85-0.98]: requires sufficient correction history
Cache similarity match disabled with session_context (context guard)
Cache max 200 entries, tiered TTL (high 2700s, med 1800s, low 900s), value-aware eviction
Active learning needs_review: low tier only, advisory
Multilingual normalization: best-effort
Execution trace node-level, max 20 entries (inline with last business step)
Violation: -0.10 confidence penalty, classification continues
Output schema contract: fallback uses minimum schema on format failure
Execution failure penalty -0.15 with decay 0.03/hour, floor -0.30
PostProcess step-independent: step1 failure does not skip step2/step3
Circuit breaker: 3-state with adaptive timeout=300*(1+failures*0.5), clamp[60,900]. Half-open allows 1 test request
Confidence attribution weights sum to 1.0; fast-path assigns weight 1.0 to keyword signal
Trace summary available for single/multi outputs only, not rejection
Semantic compression uses standard symbols (∧, ∨, →, @, ≤, ≥) — universally understood by LLMs
Value-aware eviction: freq tracking starts at 1, increments on hit; stale low-freq entries evicted first
Concept drift detection requires ≥100 learning_log entries; <100 skips drift analysis
Degradation score is composite metric from last 50 entries; >0.3 triggers advisory warning
Cache freshness (1-age/TTL) only computed for cache hits; null for cache misses
Tiered TTL: high-confidence results persist 2700s, medium 1800s, low 900s; reject tier not cached
Adaptive CB timeout: scales with consecutive failures; prevents premature recovery attempts
Degradation trend: compares current vs previous score; worsening/improving/stable classification
Input safety: detects common injection patterns (ignore previous/system prompt/role:system); flag-only, no blocking
Latency tracking: start_ts recorded in Start node; latency_ms computed as now-start_ts in OutputResult trace_summary
Smart cache invalidation: on taxonomy rebuild, high-tier unexpired entries retained; others with mismatched version_tag removed
Metrics parameterization: window sizes from shared_constraints.metrics_window; changes require AISOP update, not runtime configurable
Dual-format scan: AISOP preferred over AISIP when same-name AIAP exists in both formats; AISIP metadata used only as fallback
Input safety escalation: flagged_rate computed over adaptive_window; ≤0.15 flag-only, >0.15 WARNING, >0.30 ALERT+conf*0.7
Adaptive degradation threshold: requires ≥5 metric windows of history; <5 falls back to static default 0.3
Output flow_format: minimal schema now 5 fields (+flow_format); flow_format sourced from registry entry, not recomputed
